title: Liverpool's Salah: 'Time to go' after tough season...

content: Dominic Calvert-Lewin savored the "unbelievable feeling" as he helped Leeds United take a massive step towards confirming their Premier League status with a 3-1 victory over Burnley on Friday.

title: USL, players in tentative agreement on new CBA
summary: The United Soccer League and its players union have reached a tentative agreement on a new collective bargaining agreement for USL-Championship players. The deal addresses compensation and working conditions for league players.
content: The United Soccer League and the USL Players Association have reached a tentative agreement on a new Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA) for players in the USL-Championship.

title: Iran officials to meet with FIFA over WCup plans
